description: Composite-conviction weights, per-dimension component weights, TTM discounts, investor-quality tiers, and amplifier/suppressor caps. Loop 4 (scoring) and Loop 6 (amplify/suppress) read this. Tuning these adjusts scoring without touching subagent code.

composite_weights._doc: Composite = sum(dimension_score * weight). Must sum to 1.0. Matches the mission spec: 25% Novelty, 20% Capital, 20% Momentum, 20% Feasibility, 15% Market.

ttm_discount._doc: Time-Adjusted Conviction = Conviction * ttm_discount[band]. Lets near-term monetizers and long-horizon moonshots be compared. Sortable both ways in the report.

dimension_components._doc: Each dimension score = clamp(sum(component_value * weight) * source_reliability_multiplier, 0, 100). Component weights per dimension sum to 1.0. Components marked inverse:true mean a HIGH raw observation LOWERS the score (e.g. high competitive density => low novelty).

investor_quality_tiers._doc: Capital.investor_quality component = max tier among participating investors, blended with count. A $5M round from tier_1 investors scores far higher than $5M from unknown. Names are illustrative; match case-insensitively on substrings.

tier_3_strategic._doc: Strategic / corporate VC carries extra information for commercialization even if not a tier_1 financial VC.

tier_4_grant._doc: Non-dilutive government validation (often strong technical due-diligence signal).

amplifiers._doc: Loop 6 awards +per_signal for each INDEPENDENT signal type firing, capped at max_amplifier. convergence_count = number of distinct signal types fired (0-8).

suppressors._doc: Loop 6 subtracts per_flag for each hype/no-substance flag, capped at max_suppressor (a negative number).

crowding._doc: 0 = totally under-recognized (max alpha), 100 = fully crowded/mainstream (low alpha). Independent of conviction. Surfaced as the UNDER-RECOGNIZED <-> CROWDED meter.

lifecycle._doc: Derived in Loop 8 from the conviction trend in score_history. delta = composite(this cycle) - composite(prior cycle).

rules.rising: delta >= +3 over last cycle AND composite >= 70
rules.faded: composite dropped below conviction_floor for 2 consecutive cycles
